sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64841" key="malqaku/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μαλθακ-ύνω</orth>, <sense id="n64841.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μαλακύνω, τὰς φωνάς</ref> </xr> Sch.D.T.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0719.tlg004.perseus-grc1:p.173" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.173</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
